new_value:
{"description":"Update Rust backend to support Dolt database backend.

## Background
The beads CLI has switched from JSONL files to Dolt (MySQL-compatible version-controlled database).

## Changes Required

### 1. Add MySQL client dependency
- Add `mysql` crate to server/Cargo.toml for Dolt connectivity

### 2. Create Dolt connection module (server/src/dolt.rs)
- Parse .beads/config.yaml to detect backend type
- Connect to Dolt server (host: 127.0.0.1, port: 3306/3307)
- Connection details from config or env vars (BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_HOST/PORT/USER)

### 3. Update beads route (server/src/routes/beads.rs)
- Detect backend type (jsonl vs dolt)
- For Dolt: Query issues, dependencies, comments tables
- Keep JSONL path as fallback for legacy projects

### 4. Dolt Schema Mapping
Key tables:
- issues: id, title, description, status, priority, issue_type, owner, created_at, updated_at, etc.
- dependencies: issue_id, depends_on_id, type (blocks, parent-child, relates-to)
- comments: id, issue_id, author, text, created_at

### 5. Environment Variables
- BEADS_BACKEND: sqlite or dolt
- BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_HOST: default 127.0.0.1
- BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_PORT: default 3306
- BEADS_DOLT_SERVER_USER: default root

## References
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/master/docs/DOLT-BACKEND.md
- https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/blob/master/internal/storage/dolt/schema.go"}

new_value:
{"description":"Dolt backend support implemented. Ready for testing/review.

## Changes Made

### 1. Added MySQL dependency (server/Cargo.toml)
- Added mysql = "25" crate for Dolt/MySQL connectivity

### 2. Created dolt module (server/src/dolt.rs)
- DoltConfig struct for connection settings
- BackendType enum (Jsonl, Dolt)
- detect_backend() - reads .beads/config.yaml to detect backend
- connect() - creates MySQL connection pool
- load_beads_from_dolt() - queries issues, dependencies, comments tables

### 3. Updated beads route (server/src/routes/beads.rs)
- Added dolt integration with backend detection
- Falls back to JSONL for backward compatibility

### 4. Updated main.rs
- Added mod dolt; import

## Status: Code compiles, ready for testing","status":"blocked"}
